feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Master Data Integration issue for Subscription Billing with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using the Subscription Billing solution with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

When I try to utilize the function of test connection to make the replication is active from Sub Bill system to SAP S/4 we are encountering a 404 HTTP error and I'm attaching a screenshot below for the same.

If anyone has any expertise on how to fix this or come across same situation, please throw some lights.

SAP S/4HANA SAP Subscription Billing SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management 

Thanks!

entry.title: Goods receipt error
entry.content:
Hello,

While posting goods receipt error for production order getting error that posting can not be done because status NoMP active in sales order line item (message BS051, status NoMP is active). Sales order line item has NoMP and Cstd status active. Is this error occuring because of some linkage with material master in production order header? Kindly help to resolve this issue. 

Regards

entry.title: In ECC SD on the sales Document on the conditions tab the net amount is always a positive number.
entry.content: In ECC SD on the sales Document on the conditions tab the net amount is always a positive number. Is there a debit/Credit flag captured in a table that determines this?

entry.title: remove billing plan block from sales order
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have setup billing plan at the item category level, the process is like this - 
1. Create a sales order with billing plan
2. remove the billing plan block
3. create invoice.

whenever we want to create an invoice for the particular line item, first we have to remove billing plan block from the sales order line item, now we want to give access to a user for removing this block in the production, we can not give access of VA02, we just want to give access for billing plan tab, so we decided to create a transaction variant for it. but even in transaction variant we are not able to hide all the fields or not able to make all the fields not editable. Is there any other options available for this requirement?? please advise

entry.title: Avoid new deliveries for a purchase order
entry.content:
Hi, I need some help on how should be the logic to avoid the creation of a new delivery for a purchase order.

I tried through abap code at USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE of MV50AFZ1, but with no luck.

      SELECT vbeln posnr vgbel vgpos
        INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_lips
        FROM lips
        FOR ALL ENTRIES IN xlips
        WHERE vgbel = xlips-vgbel
          AND vgpos = xlips-vgpos.

      SORT lt_lips BY vgbel vgpos.

      LOOP AT xlikp ASSIGNING <fs_likp> WHERE updkz NE 'D'.
        LOOP AT xlips ASSIGNING <fs_lips>
                         WHERE vbeln EQ <fs_likp>-vbeln
                           AND updkz NE 'D'.

          READ TABLE lt_lips TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS WITH KEY vgbel = <fs_lips>-vgbel
                                                             vgpos = <fs_lips>-vgpos BINARY SEARCH.
          IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
            MESSAGE e002(zmm76).
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.
      ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Account Assignment Category for Third Party Sales
entry.content: What factors we need to consider while deciding the Account Assignment Category for Third-Party Schedule line Category CS in SAP?

entry.title: Service Product Add on SD document.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

         According to the user requirement, we want to add the service product on SD Sale order.

Require condition: when we sold to customer - sale order document has included Finished Goods Product and Service Product. These two products revenues are needed to split. And finished product is immediately delivered but service product will create servicing process after three months. For servicing process can link with service order from the sale order??

How to solve this condition?

Thanks,

Honey

SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Data Migration by creating copies. Best Approach?
entry.content:
I have a client that needs to replace all Material Master data with copies of new Materials (This is being done to enable Batch Split Valuation). So after creating new materials, we need to create new BOMs, recipes, production versions, inspection plans, Batch masters, Move Stock, purchase info records, sales conditions records. Can someone help me out with identifying BAPIs for this process. I need to be able to extract the existing data, change the material code and upload the new data.

I've found BAPI/FM for some of the master datas

1. Material Master - BAPI_MATERIAL_GETALL , BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA , BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA

2. BOM - CSAP_MAT_BOM_READ , CSAP_MAT_BOM_MAINTAIN

3. Recipe -

4. Production Version -

5. Batches -

6. Stock - BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE , BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT

7. Purchase Info Record -

8. Sales Condition Record -

entry.title: How to create a Sales Order in the new fiori application with configurable materials ?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on S/4 HANA Cloud: Public edition version 2402 and am not able to access the modification feature of characteristic values for configurable materials which is the following screen, when creating and/or editing a sales order in the new fiori application: 

In the "change Sales Order", when adding a new item to my Sales Order with a configurable material => I was expecting to have the popup above to be able to modify the configuration variant data! 

But no popup is displayed.

Then If I go to the "display sales order" => I can see a "configuration column" for configurable materials:

This "configuration column" is displayed in the "display SO" new fiori app, but IS NOT not shown when switching to the Edit mode) => is that normal? something is missing or this is a bug to raise to SAP?

On the other hand, if I use the "change Sales Order - VA02" application from whitin the fiori launchpad, I can see the "old" configuration button which allows me to access the variant configuration modification feature: 

Is this feature "hidden"? "not available" yet?

Thanks all

entry.title: Account group to BP Grouping Mapping during Synchronization
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are doing CVI pre conversion activities on ECC system. we are having intercompany customers & vendors which. Client want so assign them to a single BP as they are having common legal address.

Question is we have mapped customer & vendor account groups to individual BP grouping 1:1 relationship.

considering above intercompany requirement, Is it mandatory to assign those customer & vendor account group to a common BP grouping? during synchronization does system assign those customer & vendor to a common BP if we keep 1:1 account group to BP grpng mapping? 

we are planning configuration of mapping account groups to common BP during post conversion, Is this approach is feasible?

Thank you

entry.title: Forwarding agent as a generic use
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a query, my customer wants to create a generic Forwarding agent to use within country deliveries for local delivery companies. for example: To ship small sample shipments in Taiwan(from one CM to Taipai office)

They have forwarding agents like UPS and FedEx, but the deliveries are done by local delivery companies, which they don't want to redirect to FedEx or UPS. They want to use a generic forwarding agent code for all local delivery companies.

Since this my first time dealing forwarding agent issue, please light me up.

Thank you in advance.

Siva prasad

entry.title: Milestone Billing - SAP SD
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to replicate PS Milestone Billing Scenario in Public Cloud. However, I cannot find any option to create Milestone at WBS or Network Activities. But In the Billing Plan tab of Sales Order I find the Milestone option and when I click on it, it gives me to choose between WBS/ Network. 

Firstly, I wanted to know if we could create Milestones at WBS/ Activities and Second, I wanted to know if there are any CBC configs required for Milestone Billing from Professional Services/Project Management.

Customer is an AD service company, and we are going to use Milestone Billing solution in place.

When I create a Sales Order line item there is two options one for Create Dates and one for Milestones and it is asking for Network and WBS element. I have no clue what these are and how to create them. 

Or is it possible to create a milestone billing plan without Project Systems?

Could somebody guide me with the above, thank you!

-Brinda S

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP Commercial Project Management for SAP S/4HANA SAP Commercial Project Management

entry.title: Failed SHPCON idoc (51 status) changes the packed qty in the SD delivery document
entry.content:
Hello SCN,
One of my clients is using SAP ERP 6.0 (EHP7) and below is the problem definition.

A sales order is first created, followed by the creation of a delivery note, which is then sent to the third-party logistics (3PL) Warehouse Management System (WMS). The WMS fulfills the order by shipping the requested quantity to the customer and subsequently sends the necessary details to SAP via an IDoc. Below is an example of the Idoc for reference.

It's surprising that the failed Idoc successfully updated the packed quantity in the delivery document. I'm curious about what caused the failed IDoc to trigger the update in the delivery document?

Additionally, after assigning the cost center to the GL (450030) in KA02 and reprocessing the IDoc in BD87, another issue arose: the IDoc attempted to update the packed quantity details again, resulting in an error message stating, "Packing not possible since there is no quantity to be packed".

Please advise if this is the bug in the function module or the Idoc needs a change in the data.

entry.title: SAP SD - Organizational Structure
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Requirement is a ad service company who has different product types calles weedmaps, canveya and ads and each product types will have different other services associated with it and also it has different pricing procedures. But customer wants to have a single invoice to be billed out for all these different products types with different pricing. How can we approach this by sales org, distribution channel and division? Or should I use any other field other than the org elements. I need to take a decision on how many sales org, distr chnl and division this customer can have. 
Please give me some advise.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Trigger DESADV Outbound IDOC after transfer order confirmation
entry.content:
Dear all,

we send ASN to customer via DESADV IDoc. Problem is, that currently the warehouse colleagues needs to c open the delivery via VL02N and close it again to trigger DESADV AFTER transfer order is confirmed completely. We cannot trigger DESADV via GI, as customer is sitting next to company and GI is posted after truck is loaded, so that is too late.
How can I trigger DESADV automatically, after warehouse finished picking and confirm the transfer order completely?

My idea is:
- running batch job and check TO status > do not like this as it does not happen every day

Any ideas appreciated,
Thanks in advance & rgds,
Barbara

entry.title: S4HANA Material segmentation - POOL search
entry.content:
Dear Sap Experts,

I am working on S4HANA  material segmentation and logic for ATP Pool in SGT_SETUP.

I have a requirement to use 1 material , 1 segmentation strategy with different Pool search depending on the customer.

  • For 95% of the customers the search should be done among all MMBE availability in ration 1:m. The qty in SO should be confirmed if there is availability of the material in any stock segment but not only in the segment stated in SO . However, in my scenario we are not even going to register a requirement segment. So for this group of customers the qty should be confirmed as long as there is available qty for the material in MMBE.
  • For 5 % of the customers the search should not be done among all MMBE availability but it should be done in ratio 1:1 i.e. the qty in SO should be confirmed ONLY if there is availability for the material with requirement segment stated in SO.

 

I am trying to set up the requirement using SGT_SETUP -> Stock allocation  and ATP Pool.

The set up is:

 

 

Then the ATP pool is:

 

 

The problem is that the set up works for 95% of the customers i.e. the search is done among the values in Pool1.

However, for 5% of the customers if I create a SO with requirement segment 10000252 CN001 the ATP is performed again among all stock segments but not 1:1.

I can not find a way to set up the Pools per customer.

Best regards,

Diliana and Teodora

entry.title: Material segmentation Default and invalid blank value
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am working on a material segmentation setup in S4Hana. In TC: SGT_SETUP for 1 material and 1 segmentation strategy I need to set two different default logics for the SO field - Requirement segment.

I need the two different default logics since I aim to have different behaviors of the Requirement segment field in SO depending on my customers.

For 95% of my customers, I need to have a blank and valid requirement segment field in SO. This works and can be done. Based on this set up I can create a complete SO with a blank requirement segment. It seems the blank segment is automatically set to default, so in this scenario, blank is both the Default and Valid segment.

For 5% of my customers, I have to make sure the Requirement segment field in SO is incomplete i.e. the requirement segment shouldn't have a default, and the blank shouldn't be valid. This way for 5% of the customers It will not be possible a SO to be completed unless users enter a valid Requirement segment value.

So, to meet the requirements for 5% of the customer I need the option to set the requirement segment for those 5% - the blank segment should not be valid and I don't need to have a default. However, as already mentioned,  if there is a blank value it is always the default. 

Please advise if there is a way the described behavior to be done via default set up or in any other way.

Your input will be highly appreciated

Regards

DiliK

entry.title: Storage location cannot be found in sales order
entry.content:
Based on shipping conditions, plant and shipping point the system should find storage location for the sales order.

How can we get the storage location automatically filled in sales order?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales order approval pending in work items but sales order does not exist any more
entry.content:
Hello experts!

There is a user who is getting sales order approval pending e-mail every day but when he checks the Fiori app for pending approvals, he doesn't see any sales order.
So, I checked the work items pending for his user ID and there is this one sales order work item from June, 2023 in his inbox as seen here:


On further checking, I did see the sales order for which he is getting the e-mail everyday.

But when I checked the sales order, it shows me that this sales order is no longer available in the system.

I am guessing that another level approver must have approved it but for some reason the system still sends him the e-mail.

So, can someone please tell me what is the most appropriate way to handle the issue?
And by issue, I mean, what should be done so that the user does not receive these sales order approval pending e-mail every day since the sales order does not even exist anymore?

I am new to workflow and the general approval processes for SD module. So, I'm not sure if this info is enough to understand the problem. If any more details are required, ask away but pls provide your insights to tackle the problem.

Thanks, in advance 🙂

entry.title: creation of multiple sales return orders by the reference of single sales invoice number
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a business scenario where we are able to create multiple sales return orders by the reference of single sales invoice number in standard SAP. Business requirement is, if any return order is created against the Invoice number then next time when one more return order is to be created with same invoice number then system should populate the warning message.
